## HEXBIN chart, SUTRA style

Render as SVG (or equivalent) on a 960x540 px canvas.
Every position, size, and color below is exact. No adjectives, no improvisation.

### AI metadata (for agent routing)
```json
{
  "code": "CH-COR-05",
  "ovp_version": "1.0",
  "intent": [
    "correlation",
    "density"
  ],
  "form": "hexagonal bins colored by point count",
  "data_required": "50+ x,y points, too many for honest individual dots",
  "family": "COR",
  "alternatives": [
    "CH-COR-01 (few enough points to draw raw)",
    "CH-COR-03 (categorical axes)"
  ],
  "see_instead": [
    {
      "when": "under ~50 points",
      "use": "CH-COR-01"
    },
    {
      "when": "axes are categories, not measures",
      "use": "CH-COR-03"
    }
  ]
}
```

Use when:
- hundreds of points where overplotting hides the density
- finding regimes and clusters in a relationship

Do NOT use when:
- few points (bins hide what dots would show)
- reading individual items (bins have no identity)

### Input data shape
```json
{
  "title": "action title naming the cluster",
  "source": "bottom-left always",
  "unit_x": "x axis unit",
  "unit_y": "y axis unit",
  "points": "[{x, y}], 50+, all >= 0"
}
```

```json
      1,

    ],

  }

```

### Rules
- binning is the published deterministic algorithm: axial rounding on pointy-top hexes
- color ramp is the deterministic background-to-high mix
- the count key (min, mid, max) is the one permitted key
- both axes zero-based

### Never do this
- rainbow density ramps
- smoothed density contours sold as data
- hexbins for tiny datasets

### QA before delivering
- [ ] >= 50 points
- [ ] count key present
- [ ] deterministic binning
- [ ] source present

### Colors (resolved, use these exact values)

| Element | Color |
|---|---|
| background | `#FFFFFF` |
| cell_high | `#1F3864` |
| gridline | `#C9D6EE` |
| zero_line | `#8EAADB` |
| tick_label | `#262626` |
| x_label | `#262626` |
| title | `#1F3864` |
| source | `#262626` |

### Fonts

- Title font: Cambria,Georgia,serif, weight 700
- All other text: Cambria,Georgia,serif, weight 400 (600 on highlighted items)

### Language chrome

No kicker, no eyebrow; title at the default y.
